name: Chimp Rewriter API
description: ChimpRewriter is an article spinner/rewriter API. It provides text rewriting and spinning capabilities. The API uses POST requests with form-encoded parameters. Note: The chimprewriter.com site was returning HTTP 522 at documentation fetch time; this spec is based on limited archived information.
